{"problem_standardized_math":"After the normal step $v$ has been computed, define the residual vectors\n\\[\nr_e=A_e(x)v_x+c_e(x),\\qquad r_I=A_I(x)v_x-Sv_s+(c_I(x)-s),\n\\]\nand let $w=\\tilde p-v$. Show that the problem\n\\[\n\\begin{aligned}\n& \\min_{p_x,\\tilde p_s}\\; \\nabla f^T p_x+\\frac12 p_x^T\\nabla_{xx}^2\\mathcal L\\,p_x-\\mu e^T\\tilde p_s+\\frac12\\tilde p_s^T S\\Sigma S\\tilde p_s \\\\\n\\text{subject to}\\quad & A_e(x)p_x+c_e(x)=r_e,\\\\\n& A_I(x)p_x-S\\tilde p_s+(c_I(x)-s)=r_I,\\\\\n& \\|(p_x,\\tilde p_s)\\|_2\\le \\Delta,\\\\\n& \\tilde p_s\\ge -\\tau e\n\\end{aligned}\n\\]\nbecomes, in the variables $w$, a quadratic program with a circular trust-region constraint and a bound constraint."}
